exceptions.rationale: Legacy CPF cumulative tranche test file still carries pre-GC-023 history despite ongoing tranche-local extraction.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: MANDATORY for ANY tranche touching CPF tests: new tranche tests MUST go into a dedicated file, never appended to index.test.ts. index.test.ts is frozen at current line count and must only shrink.

exceptions.rationale: Execution plane foundation still carries multi-tranche cumulative tests in one governed entry file. W6-T1 violation (2155 lines) was caught and remediated: streaming tests extracted to execution.streaming.test.ts.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: MANDATORY for ANY tranche touching EPF tests: new tranche tests MUST go into a dedicated file (e.g. execution.<domain>.test.ts), never appended to index.test.ts. index.test.ts is frozen at current line count and must only shrink.

exceptions.rationale: Learning plane foundation still carries cumulative tranche tests in one governed entry file.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: MANDATORY for ANY tranche touching LPF tests: new tranche tests MUST go into a dedicated file, never appended to index.test.ts. index.test.ts is frozen at current line count and must only shrink.

exceptions.rationale: Safety dashboard page is a legacy dense route surface with unresolved subcomponent extraction debt.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Extract route sections and view-model helpers into subcomponents/hooks before the next substantive safety dashboard change.

exceptions.rationale: Legacy template catalog remains centralized and exceeds the new general-source threshold.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Split the template catalog by domain or template family before the next substantive template-library expansion.

exceptions.rationale: Spec export component still combines multiple export views and orchestration helpers in one surface.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Extract export panels and helper logic into subordinate components/hooks before the next substantive export workflow change.

exceptions.rationale: Execution plane foundation barrel still aggregates multiple contract exports in one compatibility surface.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Split the barrel into tranche-local or domain-local export files before the next substantive execution-plane surface expansion.

exceptions.rationale: The VS Code guide is a legacy dense active reference that still concentrates setup, workflow, and troubleshooting in one place.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Split the guide into narrower linked references before the next substantive VS Code guide expansion.

exceptions.rationale: The system unification remediation roadmap is the canonical living checkpoint record for all W6 tranches. GC-018 continuation checkpoints are appended per tranche and cannot be separated without breaking the audit chain.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: Archive completed wave checkpoints into a separate historical record once W6 wave is fully closed. Do not expand beyond 1500 lines without a new exception.

exceptions.rationale: Immutable archive of all GC-018 checkpoint blocks from W1-T1 through W6-T76 (76 tranches, 1493 lines). Archive files cannot be split without breaking the audit chain integrity. File is frozen — no further additions permitted.
exceptions.requiredFollowup: No further expansion permitted. This is a sealed archive. Create a new archive file if a second archive is needed.
